issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: LS leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflow branches, causing TCs and HAs to receive duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter associated with Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks on affected deal records.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for those deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to suppress tasks for deals in terminal stages.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering post-referral tasks on deals that were already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and closing info tasks did not re-trigger. This was because 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include Offer Accepted.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through a stage reversal and were moved back to Offer Accepted during the impact window to ensure TCs receive closing tasks.

issues.title: Emails referencing wrong loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to the agent continued to reference the previous LO instead of the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where the LO was switched from Paul to Julie Yocum. The fix was confirmed resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For any deals with an LO change during the impact window, manually verify and resend agent introduction emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow or triggering tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or associated tasks, leaving TCs unaware of closings. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and a fix was confirmed applied. MRC leads frequently have no lender assigned, which was initially suspected but not confirmed as the root cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 into the TC workflow and send closing info emails manually.
